description:
First step that affects the goldens. Applies .21.1's three coordinated
codegen sites AND types halt-cont per program so the seam at the very
end of the chain is the type that flows in (per user direction:
"the halt 'continuation' passed in should just match this type, and
can be implemented by a regular function in the runtime").

This bundles what was originally split as 22.2 + 22.5 because either
one alone breaks tests: 22.2 narrows the cont seam, but halt-cont's
hardcoded Tagged sig at chain-end mismatches; 22.5 alone has no narrow
chain to type. They land together.

## Codegen narrowing (was .21.1)

1. build_fn_signature cont-fn branch: param_reprs[0].cl_type() for
   result param.
2. compile_fn cont-fn entry harness: append_block_param(my_param_reprs[0]
   .cl_type()); drop the Tagged coerce.
3. Term::Return native branch: sig with return_reprs[this_spec_id]
   .cl_type(); coerce val to my_return_repr.
4. Print builtin: check raw_int_vars / raw_f64_vars (cont params
   narrowed by typer cont_input_key without local FnTypes reflecting).

## Typed halt-cont (was 22.5)

Three runtime fns, three codegen bodies, per-repr singleton in Process.

Runtime:
- fz_halt_implicit_i64(val: i64): current_process().halt_value = val
- fz_halt_implicit_f64(val: f64): halt_value = val.to_bits() as i64
- fz_get_halt_cont_i64 / _f64 lazy singleton getters (mirror existing
  fz_get_halt_cont for Tagged).

Process:
- halt_cont_singleton_tagged / _i64 / _f64 fields.
- init_halt_cont_singletons(tagged_addr, i64_addr, f64_addr).

CompiledModule:
- halt_cont_body_tagged_addr / _i64 / _f64.

Codegen:
- Declare halt_cont_body_{tagged,i64,f64}_id, get_halt_cont_{...}_id.
- Emit halt_cont_body_i64 sig (i64, i64) -> i64 tail; body calls
  fz_halt_implicit_i64.
- Emit halt_cont_body_f64 sig (f64, i64) -> i64 tail; body calls
  fz_halt_implicit_f64.
- fz_main_entry: pick singleton + body matching main's return_repr.
- fz_spawn_entry: stays _tagged (closure-targets always return Tagged).
- Each synth_halt_cont site in Term::Call / TailCall / Receive picks
  by callee's return_repr.

AOT shim: pass all three body addrs at setup.

## Acceptance

- 511 + 0 failed.
- add1.clif golden: ishl_imm/bor_imm at 28-29 deleted; sshr_imm at 41
  deleted. BLESS the diff.
- Other goldens: review diffs, bless intentional, fix unintentional.

comments.text:
2026-05-14 — all listed sub-steps are already in tree:

  - .21.1's three coordinated sites: done (see fz-ul4.27.21.1 close).
  - Typed halt-cont per program: done in fz-ul4.27.22.3.
  - Print builtin Descr-dispatched typed FFI: done (line 5167-5187
    in src/ir_codegen.rs; descr_is_int / descr_is_float route to
    typed print_i64 / print_f64; raw_int_vars / raw_f64_vars
    correctly tracked).

After fz-3zx the cont seam Descrs come from the LFP outer fixpoint
so producer return_reprs and consumer param_reprs[0] agree by
construction — the original concern about FnTypes not reflecting
cont_input_key narrowing is moot.

Closing as already-landed.

title: fz-cps-closure.4: typed Term::Return cont seam
